requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality - 60 Hz Harmonics, FCC/UL Project Expectations, and BEL Review
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 和电能质量 - 60 Hz 谐波、FCC/UL 项目预期及 BEL 审查
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 和電能品質 - 60 Hz 諧波、FCC/UL 專案預期及 BEL 審查

summary.en: Belize has not been confirmed to operate a standalone public mandatory EMC certification scheme specifically for PV inverters. In practice, EMC and power-quality evidence for Belize grid-tied PV inverter projects should be aligned with BEL/PUC interconnection review and Americas project practice. Relevant evidence can include IEEE 1547 power-quality performance, UL 1741 certification scope, FCC Part 15 EMC evidence where communications or electronic equipment scope is relevant, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-series EMC reports where requested by the project owner. Because Belize is 60 Hz, harmonic and conducted-emission behavior should be checked at the intended 60 Hz voltage configuration rather than relying on China 50 Hz results.
summary.zh: 目前未确认伯利兹针对光伏逆变器设有独立公开的强制性 EMC 认证制度。实务上，伯利兹并网光伏逆变器项目的 EMC 和电能质量证据应与 BEL/PUC 并网审查及美洲项目惯例保持一致。相关证据可包括 IEEE 1547 电能质量性能、UL 1741 认证范围、在通信或电子设备范围适用时的 FCC Part 15 EMC 证据，以及项目业主要求时的 IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 系列 EMC 报告。由于伯利兹为 60 Hz，谐波和传导骚扰表现应按拟用 60 Hz 电压配置检查，而非依赖中国 50 Hz 结果。
summary.zht: 目前未確認貝里斯針對光伏逆變器設有獨立公開的強制性 EMC 認證制度。實務上，貝里斯併網光伏逆變器專案的 EMC 和電能品質證據應與 BEL/PUC 併網審查及美洲專案慣例保持一致。相關證據可包括 IEEE 1547 電能品質性能、UL 1741 認證範圍、在通訊或電子設備範圍適用時的 FCC Part 15 EMC 證據，以及專案業主要求時的 IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 系列 EMC 報告。由於貝里斯為 60 Hz，諧波和傳導騷擾表現應按擬用 60 Hz 電壓配置檢查，而非依賴中國 50 Hz 結果。

standards_or_laws: IEEE 1547-2018 - distributed energy resource interconnection and power-quality requirements
UL 1741 - inverter and interconnection equipment certification scope, including grid support functions where applicable
FCC Part 15 - radio-frequency device EMC requirements where equipment scope applies
IEC 62920 - Photovoltaic power generating systems - EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series - EMC and harmonic/current-emission test methods where requested by project specification

summary.en: China PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408 and related domestic test methods at CNAS-accredited laboratories. That evidence may include conducted and radiated emission, immunity, and power-quality checks under Chinese grid assumptions. It does not by itself prove FCC Part 15 relevance, UL 1741 project acceptance, IEEE 1547 power-quality compliance, or 60 Hz harmonic performance for Belize's NEMA-style distribution system.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器 EMC 证据通常依据 GB/T 37408 及相关国内测试方法，由 CNAS 认可实验室出具。该证据可能包括在中国电网假设下的传导和辐射骚扰、抗扰度及电能质量检查。但其本身不能证明 FCC Part 15 适用范围、UL 1741 项目接受、IEEE 1547 电能质量合规，或伯利兹 NEMA 式配电系统下的 60 Hz 谐波表现。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器 EMC 證據通常依據 GB/T 37408 及相關國內測試方法，由 CNAS 認可實驗室出具。該證據可能包括在中國電網假設下的傳導和輻射騷擾、抗擾度及電能品質檢查。但其本身不能證明 FCC Part 15 適用範圍、UL 1741 專案接受、IEEE 1547 電能品質合規，或貝里斯 NEMA 式配電系統下的 60 Hz 諧波表現。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) - includes domestic EMC and power-quality provisions
NB/T 32004-2018 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC reports should be supplemented with project-accepted EMC and power-quality evidence for Belize. For grid-tied equipment, confirm with BEL and the project engineer whether IEEE 1547 power-quality data, UL 1741 certification, FCC Part 15 reports, IEC 62920, or IEC 61000 reports are required. Retest or technically justify harmonic and conducted-emission behavior at 60 Hz / 110-220 V if prior evidence was generated at China 50 Hz / 220-380 V settings.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC 报告应补充伯利兹项目接受的 EMC 和电能质量证据。对于并网设备，应向 BEL 和项目工程师确认是否需要 IEEE 1547 电能质量数据、UL 1741 认证、FCC Part 15 报告、IEC 62920 或 IEC 61000 报告。如既有证据按中国 50 Hz / 220-380 V 参数生成，应在 60 Hz / 110-220 V 下重新测试或作出技术论证。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC 報告應補充貝里斯專案接受的 EMC 和電能品質證據。對於併網設備，應向 BEL 和專案工程師確認是否需要 IEEE 1547 電能品質數據、UL 1741 認證、FCC Part 15 報告、IEC 62920 或 IEC 61000 報告。如既有證據按中國 50 Hz / 220-380 V 參數生成，應在 60 Hz / 110-220 V 下重新測試或作出技術論證。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent: EMC and power-quality evidence is mandatory where BEL/PUC, the project owner, lender, EPC, or procurement specification requires it; 60 Hz validation is a practical grid-connection requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-based for many China PV inverter EMC certificates; China domestic EMC evidence is not a Belize market-access substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC evidence as background only for Belize. Confirm BEL/PUC and project-owner expectations for IEEE 1547 power quality, UL 1741 scope, FCC Part 15, IEC 62920, or IEC 61000 evidence, and validate harmonic behavior at 60 Hz / 110-220 V. Do not rely on 50 Hz China EMC reports as automatic Belize acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对伯利兹而言，应将中国 GB/T 37408 EMC 证据仅作为背景资料。请确认 BEL/PUC 及项目业主对 IEEE 1547 电能质量、UL 1741 范围、FCC Part 15、IEC 62920 或 IEC 61000 证据的要求，并在 60 Hz / 110-220 V 下验证谐波表现。不要将中国 50 Hz EMC 报告视为伯利兹自动接受依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對貝里斯而言，應將中國 GB/T 37408 EMC 證據僅作為背景資料。請確認 BEL/PUC 及專案業主對 IEEE 1547 電能品質、UL 1741 範圍、FCC Part 15、IEC 62920 或 IEC 61000 證據的要求，並在 60 Hz / 110-220 V 下驗證諧波表現。不要將中國 50 Hz EMC 報告視為貝里斯自動接受依據。
